arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca offers final Chelsea transfer lifeline as genius contract clause explained
arts.sum: Harvey Vale has been handed a lifeline by Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca in the past eight days. While Maresca has certainly handed Vale a lifeline in recent matches, his future at the club remains uncertain.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Everton vs Chelsea on TV? How to watch Premier League clash
arts.sum: Premier League fans in the UK may be confused as to why Chelsea's trip to Everton isn't being televised on Sunday as the Blues chase down a spot at the top of the Premier League

arts.ttl: Everton vs Chelsea: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Everton take on Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot points finger at Chelsea's transfer spending as Liverpool title battle heats up
arts.sum: Liverpool are slugging it out with Chelsea for the Premier League crown and Arne Slot says it is good for football to see his Reds up there

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche makes feelings clear on outgoing Everton owner Farhad Moshiri
arts.sum: Farhad Moshiri has sold his 94.1 per cent stake in Everton to The Friedkin Group (TFG), ending his often troubled near nine-year ownership of the club

arts.ttl: 'The way he is going': Jaap Stam makes big claim about Chelsea star Cole Palmer
arts.sum: The Cole Palmer hype train is showing no signs of slowing down during what’s turning out to be a superb individual season from the Chelsea...

arts.ttl: Coy Jota confession, Carney Chukwuemeka door opened and £11m man reveals exit 'plan' – Celtic transfer state of play
arts.sum: It's shaping up to be a busy January window for the Hoops

arts.ttl: Report: Two clubs have now made enquiries about signing 'fantastic' Chelsea player in January
arts.sum: The recent transfer windows have been pretty chaotic at Chelsea under this ownership, so what’s in store at Stamford Bridge next month? In terms of...

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'make £58m goalkeeper January transfer decision' as Robert Sanchez pressure grows
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca could be looking at replacing Robert Sanchez as his first-choice Chelsea goalkeeper in the not-too-distant future. Priorities may lie elsewhere in the winter window for Chelsea however, with Enzo Maresca revealing that Wesley Fofana and Benoit Badiashile will now both miss a significant period through injury.

arts.ttl: Everton could be without five players for Chelsea as midfielders make progress
arts.sum: James Garner shared a positive update on his recovery but will not be available for the Chelsea match. Armando Broja will miss out while a late call will be made on Dwight McNeil
